A

age - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
 
AMERICAN_DREAM - Static variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
Life should be better, richer and fuller for everyone regardless of their social status, which attracted a lot of immigrants in the 1950s in search for a better life for their future generations.
AmericanDaughter - Class in JoyLuck.newHistorism
Represents an American-born daughter of a ChineseMother, inheriting her mother's survival method using Java's extends keyword.
AmericanDaughter(String, int, String) - Constructor for class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
 

C

CAPITALISM_AMERICA - Static variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
The modern American society in the 1980s that valued individualism, freedom, and capitalism.
ChineseMother - Class in JoyLuck.newHistorism
ChineseMother suyuanWoo = new ChineseMother("Suyuan Woo", HistoricalEnvironment.WARTIME_CHINA); ChineseMother lindoJong = new ChineseMother("Lindo Jong", HistoricalEnvironment.PATRIARCHAL_CHINA); ChineseMother yingYing = new ChineseMother("Ying-ying St.
ChineseMother(String, String) - Constructor for class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
 
CONCUBINE_CHINA - Static variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
Concubinage system: In China between 1920 and 1930, males could have multiple concubines, who were considered inferior to the primary wife, with their status declining based on their numbers.
conflictWithMom - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
 

E

eatBitterness() - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
Deprecated.
Compiled as a survival requirement in HistoricalEnvironment.CONCUBINE_CHINA, where showing pain invites punishment from the patriarchal hierarchy.

G

getHistoricalTrauma(boolean) - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
Provides direct access to the mother's individual private trauma.

H

HistoricalContextMissingException - Exception Class in JoyLuck.newHistorism
Thrown when the caller attempts to access a ChineseMother's historical trauma without first loading the cultural and historical context in which it was produced
HistoricalContextMissingException(String) - Constructor for exception class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalContextMissingException
 
historicalEnvironment - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
 
HistoricalEnvironment - Class in JoyLuck.newHistorism
Defines historical and political contexts that determine the behaviors of characters in The Joy Luck Club.
HistoricalEnvironment() - Constructor for class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
 

I

individualTrauma - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
The trauma she experiences under her origin environment

J

JoyLuck.newHistorism - package JoyLuck.newHistorism
 

L

LegacySurvivalModeException - Exception Class in JoyLuck.newHistorism
Thrown when an inherited survival method is executed under an environment where the threat it was designed to handle no longer exists.
LegacySurvivalModeException(String) - Constructor for exception class JoyLuck.newHistorism.LegacySurvivalModeException
 

N

name - Variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
 

P

PATRIARCHAL_CHINA - Static variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
Feudal patriarchy: In 1920s China, women had little agency, often forced into submission, concubinage, or arranged marriage at a very young age.

S

splitExpenses(double, double) - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
Calculate the expense split between two partners in a shared household.

T

transmitHeritage(String) - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
Attempts to transmit historical knowledge, cultural survival widsorm to the next generation through oral storytelling

U

useInvisibleStength(String) - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.AmericanDaughter
This method overrides ChineseMother.useInvisibleStength(String).
useInvisibleStength(String) - Method in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.ChineseMother
A survival method under feudal society where the power structure could not be challenged through words

W

WARTIME_CHINA - Static variable in class JoyLuck.newHistorism.HistoricalEnvironment
Second Sino- Japanese War: A violent eight-year period (1937-1945) where China was invaded by Japan.
